summary: This is a brief administrative announcement about Matt Rocklin's blog infrastructure changes. He notifies readers that his RSS/Atom feed has moved to a new URL at matthewrocklin.com. The post references a larger redesign effort documented in a separate article. At only 26 words, this serves purely as a redirect notice for RSS subscribers.
key_points: Part of a broader website and blog redesign initiative
money_quotes: My Atom/RSS feed has moved to matthewrocklin.com/atom.xml
key_insight: A simple housekeeping notice directing RSS subscribers to the author's new feed location.
